$comment: Pylon LLC employee directory — canonical persona fixtures. Cross-referenced from tickets, PR comments, support tickets, blog posts. If you add or change a person here, update other artifacts that reference them.

people.name: Marcus Chen
people.title: Co-founder & CEO
people.background: Engineering manager at Stripe (2017-2020); before that, founding engineer at a YC W14 startup that didn't make it. Wrote the original Beacon prototype on weekends in 2020-2021.
people.voice_notes: Calm in a fire, terse in a meeting. Reuses 'narrow door' as a rhetorical device often. Allergic to investor euphemisms; uses plain numbers in board updates.

people.name: Priya Subramanian
people.title: Co-founder & CTO
people.background: Principal engineer at Datadog (2014-2020), focus on the agent and metrics ingestion. Wrote her PhD on static analysis at UIUC; never finished. Did the Rust-core inside Beacon.
people.voice_notes: Long-form thinker. PR comments are often essays. Won't ship on Fridays. Has a known soft spot for type systems and a known impatience with anything that touches DNS.

people.name: Olivia Reyes
people.title: Chief Product Officer
people.location: Mexico City, MX (US payroll, working as remote employee)
people.background: Senior PM at Linear (2019-2023). Before that, two years at a YC startup that pivoted three times. Studied industrial design originally.
people.voice_notes: Asks clarifying questions before answering anything. Writes in numbered lists. Doesn't tolerate roadmap inflation; will redline a PRD until the scope shrinks.

people.name: Daniel Park
people.title: Chief Revenue Officer
people.background: VP Sales at Snowflake (2020-2023). Before that, account exec roles at Box and AWS. Tracking-obsessed; brought a much more disciplined Salesforce hygiene to Pylon.
people.voice_notes: Lets numbers do the talking in QBRs. Friendly but punctual; will end a call at the minute. Skeptical of marketing-led leads as 'real' until they've taken a sales call.

people.name: Sasha Volkov
people.title: Chief Marketing Officer
people.location: Berlin, DE (US contractor, transitioning to US payroll Q3 2026)
people.background: Content lead at Vercel (2021-2024). Started writing as a freelance technical journalist for The New Stack and InfoQ. Reads more developer Twitter than is healthy.
people.voice_notes: Edits everyone's copy whether asked or not. Allergic to corporate-marketing voice. Has banned 14 phrases from internal use this quarter, with receipts.

people.name: Jordan Mwangi
people.title: VP Engineering, Platform
people.background: Director of platform engineering at Cloudflare (2018-2022). Owned the API gateway team. Before that, distributed systems at Twitter.
people.voice_notes: Quiet in big meetings; very direct in 1:1s. Owns Switchyard end-to-end. Files crisp incident postmortems.

people.name: Wei Chen
people.title: Engineering Director, Beacon
people.background: Static analysis researcher at Microsoft Research (2017-2022). Has shipped lint rules used by ~every Java codebase. Came to Pylon for the Rust-core challenge.
people.voice_notes: Will explain the trade-off three different ways before letting you make the choice. Famously skeptical of any rule that has more than one configuration knob.

people.name: Tomás Herrera
people.title: Engineering Director, Product Surfaces
people.background: Frontend lead at Linear (2020-2023). Co-authored the open-source state library 'Linear State'. Strongly opinionated on TanStack Query patterns.
people.voice_notes: Lobbies hard against unnecessary CSS frameworks. Owns the dashboard, billing portal, and customer onboarding flows.

people.name: Anika Bhattacharya
people.title: VP Product
people.background: Group PM at HashiCorp (2020-2024) covering Terraform Cloud. Before that, Bain & Company consulting (didn't enjoy it).
people.voice_notes: PRD format-fascist (in a good way). Every PRD she ships has the same eight sections in the same order. Holds the line on scope cuts.

people.name: Kai Tanaka
people.title: Director of Design
people.background: Senior product designer at Figma (2019-2023). Designed the Pylon dashboard's information architecture from scratch.
people.voice_notes: Refuses to use the word 'beautiful' in design reviews; calls things 'tight' or 'loose'. Very strong opinions on density.

people.name: Camille Dubois
people.title: Senior PM, Tower
people.background: PM at Looker (pre-Google acquisition). Has a stats degree and uses it. Owns the analytics roadmap end-to-end.
people.voice_notes: Comments on PRs with statistical objections. Dry humor in Slack. Writes the longest, most-loved customer-facing release notes on the team.

people.name: Renata Souza
people.title: VP Customer Success
people.background: Director of CS at Datadog (2019-2023). Before that, a long stint as a software engineer (2010-2018) at IBM and a series of startups; relevant because she translates customer pain into engineering language fluently.
people.voice_notes: Will redirect a sales conversation if she thinks the customer isn't a fit. Has killed two deals this year that the sales team wanted to take.

people.name: Bridget O'Sullivan
people.title: Director of Support
people.background: Support lead at Heroku (2017-2022). Before that, ran helpdesk for an academic CS department. Has triaged more bug reports than most people have seen.
people.voice_notes: Templates for answers but never uses them verbatim. Has a known dislike of canned responses; rewrites every one to fit context.

people.name: Tom Whitfield
people.title: Senior Customer Success Manager
people.background: Six years CSM at Atlassian; went deep on Bitbucket Cloud accounts there. Knows more about CSM-as-a-craft than anyone else on the team.
people.voice_notes: Disciplined notes-taker. Logs every customer interaction within 24 hours. Has a very good memory for which customer cares about which feature.

people.name: Fatima Al-Rashid
people.title: Senior Support Engineer (Tier 2)
people.background: Five years of T2/T3 support at GitLab. Comfortable shipping a small fix when the right answer is 'just patch it.' Engineering shadow-track candidate.
people.voice_notes: Will reproduce a bug in a clean repo before answering. Has a saved repro repo for ~30 of the most common customer issues.

people.name: David Cohen
people.title: VP Sales
people.background: Director of Sales at Wiz (2021-2024). Before that, top-quintile AE at Datadog. Aggressive but careful.
people.voice_notes: Pushes for shorter sales cycles. Has banned 'innovative' and 'revolutionary' from all sales decks (with Sasha's enthusiastic agreement).

people.name: Jake Patel
people.title: Senior Sales Engineer
people.background: SE at Snyk (2019-2023). Engineering background before that. Builds custom Beacon rule demos in real-time on prospect calls.
people.voice_notes: Often brings prospects in-bounds when the AE is overpromising. Engineering trusts him; sales trusts him; rare combination.

people.name: Mei Lin Park
people.title: Director of Marketing
people.background: Marketing director at Vercel (2020-2023). Before that, ran growth at a smaller dev-tools startup. Strong opinions on positioning vs. messaging vs. category-creation.
people.voice_notes: Will redo a landing page three times before signing off. Reads every blog comment. Treats hot takes on developer Twitter as a leading indicator, sometimes overcorrecting.

people.name: Lila Reeves
people.title: Senior Content Marketer
people.background: Staff writer at The New Stack (2021-2024). Computer science background but pivoted to writing in 2018. Authored Pylon's most-shared blog posts in Q1 2026.
people.voice_notes: Writes the way good engineers talk. Refuses to ship a post that has the word 'unlock' in it. Edits Sasha's edits.

people.name: Esther Nakamura
people.title: Developer Relations
people.background: DevRel at Cloudflare Workers (2022-2024). Before that, regular software engineer at Stripe. Speaker circuit; conference-paper author on lint-as-policy.
people.voice_notes: Records a video walkthrough faster than most people can write a tweet. Good at the in-person evangelism part; unenthusiastic about LinkedIn.

people.name: Amir Hosseini
people.title: VP Finance
people.background: Director of FP&A at GitLab (2021-2024). Before that, IB at Goldman Sachs (didn't enjoy it).
people.voice_notes: Skeptical of growth-at-all-costs framing. Brings the unit-economics conversation back into board prep. Doesn't tolerate hand-wavy revenue forecasts.

people.name: Naomi Brooks
people.title: VP People
people.background: Head of People at Render (2022-2024). Before that, tech recruiter then HRBP at GitHub.
people.voice_notes: Has rebuilt Pylon's leveling guide twice already. Owns the no-Friday-PR-merges rule (engineering wanted it; she pushed it through).

people.name: Hugo Lefèvre
people.title: Senior Engineer, Beacon
people.background: Engineer at SonarSource (2019-2023) on the SonarPython team. Co-authored several open-source linters; familiar with the entire competitive landscape.
people.voice_notes: Authoritative on rule-design trade-offs. Will reject a rule proposal in code review on theoretical grounds before reading the implementation.

people.name: Ravi Mehta
people.title: Staff Engineer, Infrastructure
people.location: Bangalore, IN (US contractor; longest-tenured contractor on the team)
people.background: SRE at Stripe (2017-2022) on the API platform. Built much of Pylon's current observability and incident-response tooling.
people.voice_notes: On-call coordinator. Wrote the incident response playbook. Will single-handedly resolve a production incident before the rest of the team is awake; will then complain about it in standup the next day.

people.name: Felix Chen
people.title: Senior Product Designer
people.background: Designer at Vercel (2022-2024). Strong on data-density UI; designed the Tower dashboards.
people.voice_notes: Iterates on a design four to six times before the first review. Allergic to gradient backgrounds and to floating action buttons.
